title: YCK's Auto Torch
description: This mods adds an toggleable item that automatically places your torches when the lights level is low!
body:
**YCK's AutoTorch**

This mod adds the Torch Placer item that allows you to focus purely to your mining. When turned on and torches are present in the user's inventory it checks for if light level is lower than 5 and places down a torch if so.

**Crafting recipe:**

![Crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d7a4e8a8802c0e9a2179944b2f9651641df8e68.png)

**Dynamically changing texture:**

![Texture when torches are in the inventory.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eeeafb6e801a9d3f59bf619ab8d63f5f4608c533.png)

![Texture when torches are not in the inventory.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/686c67b7d97894ad22e0fb1dd9e840e42224d32d.png)

**Description info:**

![Description info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/832b303244983385d09cbc343847bc777db27cad.png)
